hero.heading: How we use
hero.subtitle: We believe trust starts with transparency. Learn how our AI systems work, how we protect your data, and what rights you have.

items.title: AI Assistant
items.description: Intelligent assistant integrated with the CRM featuring 100+ tools for lead management, messaging, and workflow automation.

items.title: AI Agents
items.description: Custom agents created by users with specific prompts and selective tools for specialized tasks.

items.title: Workflow AI Actions
items.description: AI actions in automated workflows that process data, make decisions, and execute tasks without manual intervention.

dataProtection.heading: Data Protection
dataProtection.subtitle: Your data is handled with the highest level of security and privacy.

items.title: PII Scrubbing
items.description: Sensitive data such as tax IDs, email addresses, and credit card numbers are automatically detected and removed from AI logs.

items.title: No training on your data
items.description: Your data is NOT used to train AI models. Anthropic has a zero-retention policy for API calls.

items.title: Minimal retention
items.description: AI interaction logs are retained for a maximum of 7 days and automatically cleaned by the retention service.

items.title: Encryption
items.description: All data in transit and at rest is encrypted. Sensitive data has an additional encryption layer.

humanOversight.heading: Human Oversight
humanOversight.subtitle: We maintain full control over AI systems with multiple security layers.

items.title: Kill Switch
items.description: Administrators can pause and resume all AI systems instantly per user.

items.title: Security Rules
items.description: Each AI agent has configurable rules that limit actions, access, and behaviors.

items.title: Prompt Injection Detection
items.description: Prompt manipulation attempts are automatically detected and can be blocked.

items.title: Rate Limiting
items.description: Usage limits protect against abuse with 3 control tiers (short, medium, and long term).

userRights.heading: Your Rights
userRights.subtitle: You have full control over how AI interacts with your data.
items: Request processing without AI (disable AI Assistant)
Exercise LGPD rights (access, correction, deletion, portability)

iso42001.heading: ISO 42001 Alignment
iso42001.description: Catalisa follows the guidelines of ISO/IEC 42001:2023 (AI Management System) as a framework for responsible AI governance. Our AI management system (AIMS) covers:
items: AI ethics training plan for all employees
iso42001.disclaimer: Catalisa uses ISO/IEC 42001:2023 as a reference framework. This does not constitute certification or a formal compliance statement.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about how we use AI? Get in touch.

cta.heading: Committed to
cta.subtitle: Transparency, security, and respect for your data. Always.
